error_signature: subworkflow does not return any data
title: Subworkflow not returning data in main workflow execution
symptom: The 'create Google Calendar event' node does not execute when running the entire workflow, but works when executed individually. No error message is displayed.
not_this_if: Running nodes individually works without issues
root_cause: The Execute Workflow node may be set to wait for the subworkflow to complete, but if the subworkflow does not return any data due to a waiting node, the main workflow will not proceed to the next node.
fix_steps: Open the settings of the Execute Workflow node
Change the mode to not wait for subworkflow completion
agent_instruction: Change the Execute Workflow node's mode to not wait for subworkflow completion and save the workflow.
